title: AI Lead Rescue daily operator walkthrough — silent v1 (representational, AI-rendered)
description: 45-60 second silent walkthrough of the AI Lead Rescue daily operator view. Shows: morning summary, an enquiry captured overnight, a redacted Telegram-style alert, the one outstanding follow-up, and the full daily summary. Burned-in captions plus a companion WebVTT track carry the whole message; no audio. Synthetic data only — no real client data, no real tenant_id, no real Telegram resources. Final frame is a disclosure card stating 'Representational example only', 'No real client data', 'Visual generated and assisted by AI tooling, reviewed by humans'. Source-of-truth YAML lives at data/walkthroughs/lead-rescue-walkthrough-v1.yml; rendered server-side via the Playwright + FFmpeg pipeline at scripts/video/ and the workflow at .github/workflows/generate-walkthrough-video.yml.

licence.terms: AI-rendered representational walkthrough. CorpFlowAI-owned. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not relabel as a live screenshot, do not redistribute as stock, and do not use in third-party marketing without written agreement. Synthetic data only — never present as a real client view.

accessibility.alt: Silent 52-second walkthrough of the AI Lead Rescue morning view: 3 enquiries captured overnight, 1 still awaiting reply, with a redacted alert overlay and a representational-data disclosure card. Burned-in captions plus an English caption track describe each beat.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_dashboard. Replaces the static SVG mockup (lead-rescue-dashboard) in the 'What you see every morning' section with a moving, accessible walkthrough. Plays click-to-play with controls (no autoplay) so the buyer chooses when to engage. Captions are burned-in AND available via the WebVTT track for screen-reader users. Names, counts, and channels are synthetic; the asset must never be relabelled as a live screenshot.
